notes: The engineering layer for BG 2.54 does not conflate commentarial traditions. Where BG 2.54 has tradition-specific readings, the engineering analog stays at the operational layer rather than picking a metaphysical side. Arjuna asks for description; engineering layer preserves the recognition-question structure (per Shankara's gloss — bhāṣā = description by which others identify). engineering layer respects Ramanuja's nature-inferred-from-conduct frame. The Sanskrit technical terms (where named) are preserved without being flattened to English approximations that would erase their content.
